title: fergusonia zeylanica
intro: Fergusonia zeylanica, also known as the Fergusonia fern, is a species of plant in the family Davalliaceae, characterized by its distinctive fronds and epiphytic growth habit. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Fergusonia zeylanica is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
